title: Piglins to Bokoblins
description: Turns Piglins into Bokoblins from the Legend of Zelda series!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa6437925a527d690c125189ac1eee43a2d0367_0.webp)
## Turns Piglins into Bokoblins from the Legend of Zelda series!

- Piglin, Piglin Brute, and Zombified Piglin renamed to Bokoblin, Bokoblin Brute, and Stalkoblin respectively, as well as fully remodeled.
- Naming a Carved Pumpkin "Bokoblin Mask" in an anvil turns it into a unique mask.

### **Requires** OptiFine or other compatible mods that allow custom entity models.
